---
layout: cv
title: Moroni Montoya's Portfolio
---

# Moroni Montoya
Student at BYU-Idaho | Pursuing a B.S. in Computer Science

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="moronimontoya04@gmail.com">moronimontoya04@gmail.com</a>
| <a href="https://github.com/Moroni-MB">My GitHub page</a>
</div>


## Currently

I am a Computer Science student at BYU-Idaho with a strong interest in software development, problem-solving, and building practical applications. I enjoy creating projects that combine functionality and user experience, and I am currently expanding my skills in Python, C#, Machine Learning and web development.

I am actively preparing for future internship opportunities (Winter, Summer, and Fall 2027) where I can contribute to real-world software solutions and continue growing as a developer.


### Specialized in

- Python and C# programming  
- Object-oriented programming (OOP)  
- Web development fundamentals (HTML, CSS, JavaScript)  
- Building interactive applications and GUIs  
- Problem-solving and algorithmic thinking
- Mobile App development (Dart)  


### Technical Interests

- Software development and application design  
- AI-assisted tools and personal assistant systems (JARVIS project)  
- Web applications and dynamic user interfaces  
- Data structures and performance optimization  
- Automation and productivity tools  
- Mobile App development (Sprout and iTravel)


## Education

`2024 - Present`  
__Brigham Young University–Idaho__, Rexburg, ID  
- Bachelor of Science in Computer Science  
- Relevant coursework: Programming with Classes, Data Structures, Web Development  

`2017 - 2022`  
__Higley High School__, Arizona  
- High School Diploma  

`2019 - 2021`  
__East Valley Institute of Technology__, Arizona  
- Computer Programming Certification  


## Experience
`2026 - Present`  
__BYU-Idaho Support Center__, Rexburg, ID  
*AI Data Analist*  
- Analyzed 1,000+ data records to provide data-driven insights on strengths and optimization opportunities
- Applied analytical techniques to uncover the top-3 performance patterns and improvement areas 

`2025 - Present`  
__BYU-Idaho Support Center__, Rexburg, ID  
*Communications Team Lead*  
- Reduced 3 minutes in average help times by integrating AI tools with internal knowledge bases
- Led team of 4 to #1 ranking among 10 teams through coaching and workflow optimization
- Increased QA scores and CSAT ratings through targeted 1-on-1 performance coaching


`Previous Roles`

`2024 - 2025`  
__BYU-Idaho Support Center__, Rexburg, ID  
*Communication Specialist*  
- Ranked top-performing agent among 100+ support specialists for 5 consecutive weeks
- Achieved #1 customer satisfaction (CSAT) ranking for 5+ consecutive weeks
- Served 1,000+ customers while maintaining top-tier resolution speed and CSAT
  
__Other Positions__  
- Car Photographer & Car Lot Attendant  
- Pool Technician  
- Developed strong work ethic, attention to detail, and time management skills  


## Projects
### Sprout (Adulting App) – Flutter, Firebase
- Developed a mobile app focused on helping users build habits and track life responsibilities  
- Implemented features such as task completion tracking, progress points, and user interaction  
- Integrated Firebase for authentication and data storage  
- Collaborated using Git and GitHub in a team development environment  


### Tron Game – Python
- Built a grid-based Tron-style game with player and AI movement  
- Implemented collision detection, trail mechanics, and game-over logic  
- Designed enemy AI that avoids walls, prevents reverse movement, and reacts dynamically  
- Planning advanced AI behavior to strategically trap the player  


### iTravel – Mobile Application
- Developed a travel-focused mobile application for exploring destinations and planning trips  
- Designed interactive UI components using Flutter  
- Focused on user experience and clean interface design  
- Strengthened front-end development and project structuring skills  


### Canvas Assistant – Automation Tool
- Created a Google Chrome extension to assist with navigating and managing tasks within Canvas  
- Focused on improving student productivity and workflow automation  
- Explored integration with APIs and structured data handling  
- Designed with scalability for future academic tools in mind 

### Workout Generator App (Python, Tkinter)
- Designed a GUI-based application that generates personalized workout routines  
- Focused on usability and structured program design  
- Demonstrates understanding of event-driven programming  

### JARVIS Assistant (Python)
- Developing a personal assistant program with voice and text interaction  
- Planned features include task automation, information retrieval, and app control  
- Structured with modular and scalable architecture  

### Water Flow Calculator (Python)
- Built a physics-based program to calculate water pressure loss  
- Implemented formulas and unit testing for accuracy  
- Strengthened understanding of real-world problem modeling  

### Interactive Web Projects
- Created dynamic web pages using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript  
- Focused on user interaction and responsive design  


## Skills

**Programming Languages:**  
Python, C#, C, JavaScript, Dart  

**Web Technologies:**  
HTML, CSS, basic front-end development  

**Tools & Technologies:**  
Git, GitHub, Visual Studio, VS Code, Rider  

**Other Skills:**  
- Bilingual (Spanish & English)  
- Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking  
- Communication and teamwork  


## Awards & Certifications

- Microsoft Certifications: Software Development Fundamentals and Intro to Programming Using Python


## Leadership & Activities

- Participated in university-organized technology visits and networking events  
- Engaged with industry professionals to learn about real-world applications of software development  
- Competed in a 24 hour Hackathon challenge to develop a Canvas AI assistant to help with task prioritization


## Goals

- Secure a software engineering internship (2027)  
- Continue building impactful and scalable projects  
- Grow as a developer and contribute to meaningful technology solutions  


<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: 2026
-->
